# Software Agency Archive

# Uncommon

Uncommon may not be the right term, because agencies do comprise a significant portion of the world’s workforce, but it’s still a minority compared to regular employees.  There may be more independent contractors than agents.

|  | Domain stability | Job stability | Freedom | Variety |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Employee | ✔️ | ✔️ |  |  |
| Contractor |  |  | ✔️ | ✔️ |
| Agent |  | ✔️ |  | ✔️ |

An agency is an compromise between standard employment and independent contracting.
